prestazioni: AMC 4.0L (242 CID) inline-6 stroker build to 4.7L using a K1 Technologies forged crankshaft (4.000" stroke), Eagle Specialties forged H-beam connecting rods (6.125" length), and JE Pistons forged slugs (9.5:1 compression, 4.030" bore) with Total Seal gapless rings. Paired with a Mopar Performance 53020342AB high-flow cylinder head (ported and polished with Ferrea 1.98" intake/1.60" exhaust valves) and Comp Cams Xtreme Energy 262° hydraulic roller camshaft (0.501" lift, 218° duration @ 0.050").

Custom turbocharged setup using a Garrett GT3582R (82mm compressor, 0.82 A/R turbine housing) with a Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate, custom 3" stainless steel exhaust manifold (equal-length tubular design by Burns Stainless), and a Spearco 4-core front-mount intercooler (27" x 12" x 3.5"). Fuel system upgraded with Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump, Injector Dynamics ID1000 injectors, and AEM 340lph in-tank pump with a Radium Engineering dual-port fuel pressure regulator.

NV3550 5-speed manual transmission reinforced with a McLeod twin-disc clutch (RST 600 series, 26-spline input shaft) and a QuickTime SFI-certified bellhousing. Transfer case upgraded to a NP231J with a Slip Yoke Eliminator (SYE) from Tom Wood’s Custom Driveshafts, paired with a 4:1 gear reduction kit from Advance Adapters. Rear axle swapped to a Ford 8.8" with 4.10 gears, ARB Air Locker, and Yukon Gear 35-spline axles; front Dana 30 upgraded with a Currie Enterprises high-pinion housing, 4.56 gears, and a Detroit Truetrac limited-slip differential.
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a Poison Spyder Extreme Duty front fender flares (5" extended, high-clearance design) and rear quarter panel flares from GenRight Off-Road (6" overstock width). Full tube chassis reinforcement with a GenRight Off-Road bolt-on cage (4-point roll bar with integrated rock sliders and rear bumper hoop) and a custom front bumper from LoD Offroad (winch-ready, 1/4" steel plate, integrated D-ring mounts).

Rear cargo area converted to a full flatbed with a custom aluminum deck (1/8" diamond plate) and a custom hardtop removal system using a Bestop Trektop NX (modular soft-top with removable panels) paired with a Smittybilt XRC Gen3 roof rack (full-length, 300lb load capacity). Exterior lighting upgraded with Rigid Industries D-Series Pro LED pods (50" light bar in the front bumper, 30" in the rear) and Oracle Lighting halo headlights (RGB+W, sequential turn signals).

Suspension lifted to 6" using a Rubicon Express Super Flex long-arm kit (with RE-specific sway bar disconnects) and Fox 2.0 Performance Series IFP shocks (2.5" diameter, 14" travel). Wheels: Fuel Trophy 17x9" (4.5" backspacing) with BFGoodrich KM3 37x12.50R17 tires. Interior stripped and rebuilt with a full custom roll cage (6-point, chromoly) from RuffStuff Specialties, Recaro SRD bucket seats (with Schroth 4-point harnesses), and a custom aluminum dash overlay (CNC-machined, housing a Racepak IQ3 digital dash and AEM CD-7 data logger).
